$comment: Hookless settings.json for the sentinel sandbox containers. Used when SENTINEL_HOOKS=off — the container's Claude Code session runs WITHOUT firing sentinel hooks (no JSONL output, no bridge writes, no dashboard visibility). The hooked counterpart is tools/sandbox/claude-settings-hooked.json. This file is intentionally minimal and matches the legacy ~/.agents/notes/sentinel-docker-dev/claude-settings.container.json profile for backwards compatibility.
